message:
test: Add filesystem ops + Workers API tests (246 total)

Filesystem operations (5 tests):
- mkdir/rmdir with nested directories
- file rename (os.rename)
- file truncation on open('w')
- seek with SEEK_SET and SEEK_END
- stat (st_size, st_nlink)

Workers API (7 tests):
- Request URL parsing (path, query)
- Request body methods (text, json, bytes)
- Response content-type auto-detection (dict/str/bytes)
- Response.json() and Response.redirect() class methods
- Headers case-insensitivity
- Response._serialize() for WASM boundary
- Env binding auto-detection (_KV, _R2, _D1, _DB patterns)
